name: TerraBlocks
short_description: TerraBlocks is a geography-based puzzle game where you move and rotate drifting continent pieces from the North Pole to their correct places. As you progress, the challenge increases. Test your spatial awareness and geographic knowledge while rebuilding the world!
detailed_description:
TerraBlocks is a unique geography-based puzzle game that challenges you to rebuild the world, one piece at a time! This game puts your spatial awareness and problem-solving skills to the test as you fit drifting landmasses back into place.

Continental pieces slowly slide down from the North Pole, and it's up to you to move, rotate, and drop them into their correct positions. As you progress, the difficulty increases, requiring precision and strategy to complete the Earth’s puzzle.

Key Features:

🌍 Geography Meets Puzzles – Learn the true shapes, sizes, and positions of continents while playing.
🧩 Challenging Block-Dropping Gameplay – Move, rotate, and drop pieces to complete the puzzle.
🔥 Progressive Challenge – The more you place correctly, the faster and trickier the game becomes.
🗺️ Improve Your Navigation Skills – Gain a deeper understanding of Earth's geography in a fun, interactive way.
🏆 Can You Reassemble the World? – Test your skills and see if you can complete the ultimate planetary puzzle!

Are you ready to reshape the Earth? Play TerraBlocks today!
